pull.title: ci: Make repetitive command the default one
pull.body:
This PR addresses the https://github.com/bitcoin-core/secp256k1/pull/1409#discussion_r1301767281:
> couldn't we add this to `run-in-docker-action` to avoid duplication?

repo.name: secp256k1
repo.description: Optimized C library for EC operations on curve secp256k1

repo.name: secp256k1
repo.description: Optimized C library for EC operations on curve secp256k1

events.body: Thanks. I think it's even cleaner to make `./ci/ci.sh` the default, and *always* prepend the `git config`?
